goal: Add a side-effect-free patch candidate builder for the BPK-061 runtime mount patch preflight, describing candidate files and guard checks while keeping execution, server mutation, route mount, orchestrator, providers, DB, GitHub, writes, packages, workflows, and deployment out of scope.
scope_out: Do not apply patches, mount routes, call orchestrator, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, write files, deploy, change workflows, change packages, or enable execution.
claims: Runtime server patch candidates can be represented without applying them.
Ready BPK-061 preflight and candidate refs are required.
Execution and patch application remain false.
assumptions: A later patch application task would need a new lock.
dod: Ready, missing candidate ref, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Route mount, execution, orchestrator, provider, DB, GitHub, write, deployment, package, or workflow changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-061 preflighted the runtime mount patch without changing files.
